dependencies.name: OWASP Juice Shop
dependencies.description: Intentionally vulnerable web application used by GHAS and GHEC security challenges.
dependencies.attribution: OWASP Juice Shop project; preserve upstream license and notices when acquired. Not vendored in this repository.

provisioning.note: Lazy/on-demand. Run `npm run setup:juice-shop` to fetch. The tag v20.0.0 is the human-readable ref; the submodule gitlink is pinned to the exact SHA above.

dependencies.name: GHEC seed repository
dependencies.description: Participant seed repository used by GitHub Enterprise Cloud workflow and automation challenges.
dependencies.attribution: Derived from Microsoft Frontier GHEC Hackathon source material at the documented commit.

dependencies.name: Grubify Azure SRE Agent starter lab
dependencies.description: Official Microsoft Azure SRE Agent starter lab sample app and break-fix environment.
dependencies.attribution: Official Microsoft Azure SRE Agent hands-on lab. Fetched as a lazy git submodule at the pinned commit; not vendored in this repository.

provisioning.note: Lazy/on-demand. Run `npm run setup:sre-agent-lab` or the SRE ensure-starter-lab helper to fetch the pinned repo, then use external/sre-agent/labs/starter-lab.

dependencies.name: Frontier GHAS Hackathon source
dependencies.description: Source repository for the GitHub Advanced Security module content.
dependencies.attribution: Microsoft Frontier GHAS Hackathon source repository. Preserve upstream attribution and notices.

dependencies.name: Frontier GHAW Hackathon source
dependencies.description: Source repository for the GitHub Agentic Workflows module content.
dependencies.attribution: Microsoft Frontier GHAW Hackathon source repository. Preserve upstream attribution and notices.

dependencies.name: Azure SRE Agent source
dependencies.description: Canonical source repository for the Azure SRE Agent module content and starter lab.
dependencies.attribution: Canonical source is microsoft/sre-agent at the documented commit, especially labs/starter-lab and sreagent-templates.

dependencies.name: Frontier GHEC Hackathon source
dependencies.description: Source repository for the GitHub Enterprise Cloud module content.
dependencies.attribution: Microsoft Frontier GHEC Hackathon source repository at the documented commit.
